message.content:
Read the file "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/SHINJIN/1 CELL 조립 장비/PLC RAW/ST_XEC/GVL_TIMER.st" completely, then convert ALL English comments to Korean.

Translation guidelines:
- "Timer Global Variable List" → "타이머 글로벌 변수 목록"
- "Timer mapping" → "타이머 매핑"
- "System timers" → "시스템 타이머"
- "Per-unit TACT timers" → "유닛별 TACT 타이머"
- "alarm/sensor delay" → "알람/센서 딜레이"
- "Spring feeder blow delay" → "스프링 피더 블로우 딜레이"
- "product detect" → "제품 감지"
- "Plunger unit" → "플런저 유닛"
- "Spring 0.15 unit" → "스프링 0.15 유닛"
- "Spring 0.23 unit" → "스프링 0.23 유닛"
- "Check damper unit" → "체크댐퍼 유닛"
- "Grease unit" → "구리스 도포 유닛"
- "Core unit" → "코어 유닛"
- "Frame unit" → "프레임 유닛"
- "Inspection unit" → "검사 유닛"
- "Reject unit" → "불량배출 유닛"
- "added missing timers" → "누락 타이머 추가"
- "IEC 61131-3" → keep as-is
- Keep Korean words as-is, keep variable names/AT addresses unchanged

Write the modified file back.
